transcript: Sometimes I land under the moon And thank God I'm breathing And I pray don't take me soon Cause I am here for a reason, sometimes in my tears I drown, but I never let it get me down, so my negativity surrounds, I know someday it'll all turn around, cause all my life I've been waiting for, I've been praying for, for the people to say That we don't wanna fight no more, there'll be no more wars, and our children will pray One day, one day, one day One day, one day, one day It's not about win or lose We all lose when they feed on the souls of the innocent Blood drenched their head mid, keep on moving though the water stay raging In this maze, you can lose your way, your way, you crazy, but don't let it faze you no way No way Sometimes in my fears I drown But I never let it get me down So when negativity surrounds I know someday it'll all turn around Because all my life I've been waiting for, I've been praying for For the people to say that we don't wanna fight no more That we're all for one, and our children will pay One day, one day, one day One day, one will change, treat people the same Stop with the violence, down with the hate One day we'll all be free, and proud to be Under the same sun, singing songs of freedom like For you, for me, for you For you, for me, for you All my life I've been waiting for I've been praying for For the for the people to say, that we don't wanna fight no more, there'll be no more wars, and our children will pay, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one day, one
